import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { useCart } from '../context/CartContext'; import './Navbar.css'; const Navbar = ({ currentPage, setCurrentPage, openAppointmentModal, openCart }) => { const { getCartCount, getCartTotal } = useCart(); const [isMobileMenuOpen, setIsMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false); const cartCount = getCartCount(); const cartTotal = getCartTotal(); const toggleMobileMenu = () => { setIsMobileMenuOpen(!isMobileMenuOpen); }; const handleNavClick = (page) => { setCurrentPage(page); setIsMobileMenuOpen(false); // Close mobile menu after navigation }; return ( <> {/* Top Header Section */}
{/* Contact Info */}
📞 +254 712 345 678 ✉️ info@gemsofinsight.com
{/* Social Media Icons */}
{/* Main Navigation */}
{/* Logo Section */}
Gems of Insight
{/* Mobile Menu Toggle */} {/* Desktop Navigation Links */}
    • {/* Mobile-only items */}
{/* Right Section - Desktop Only */}
{cartCount > 0 && {cartCount}}
[ {cartCount} ] Basket KSH {cartTotal.toLocaleString()}
{/* Mobile Cart - Always Visible */}
{cartCount > 0 && {cartCount}}
KSH {cartTotal.toLocaleString()}
); }; export default Navbar;
